# hcloudgroup Provider

Manages groups of Hetzner Cloud servers as a single rolling-replace unit.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `hcloud_endpoint` (String) Hetzner Cloud API endpoint. Defaults to https://api.hetzner.cloud/v1.
- `hcloud_token` (String, Sensitive) Hetzner Cloud API token. Defaults to the HCLOUD_TOKEN env var.
